title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE NEW DJ VIDEO🎧
【on a clear day】

whistle, scat & humming

This time, we're sharing a transition scene from "Thème Trafic – Jaques Tati" into "Journal De Bord – Bernard Gérard".

Enjoy a DJ set with a pleasant whistling sound like a spring breeze caressing your cheeks.

今回は「THÈME TRAFIC - JAQUES TATI」から「Journal De Bord · Bernard Gérard」への繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
頬を撫でる春風のような口笛の音色が心地よく響くDJセットをお楽しみください。

Listen To MyTube!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZxoSOhQEXVU
